name: Potato Cake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup C and H Granulated Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together sugar and butter.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Add mashed potatoes, chocolate, and nuts. Stir until well blended.
4. Combine flour, baking powder, and spices.
5. Add alternately with milk to the creamed mixture.
6. Spoon thick batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9-inch pan.
7. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for 45 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool completely.
9. Sprinkle with C & H Powdered Sugar or serve with dollops of sweetened whipped cream.

From the C and H Sugar Kitchen
